descriptions: Lost Souls was founded by expelled members of Black Diamond Riders.
edges.evidence_quote: The expelled Black Diamond Riders founded what journalist Jerry Langton called the "rather forlornly named" Lost Souls Motorcycle Club of Milton.

descriptions: Lost Souls merged into Satan's Choice.
edges.evidence_quote: Instead of rejoining the Black Diamond Riders, Satan's Choice to made a better offer, leading for the Lost Souls to join Satan's Choice on 13 April 1996.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers called a peace meeting attended by Liberated Panthers.
edges.evidence_quote: It took place on December 8, 1971, and was attended by two hundred representatives from dozens of Bronx gangs, including the Black Pearls, Black Spades, Dirty Dozens, Dutchmen, Latin Spades, Liberated Panthers, Magnificent Seven, Peacemakers, Royal Javelins, Savage Skulls, Seven Immortals, Turbans, and Young Sinners, together with police and city officials.

descriptions: Mannolo and Falcone were targeted together in operation Big Bang, suggesting they are part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: 29 marzo 2021: operazione Big Bang contro le cosche Mannolo, Scerbo, Zoffreo e Falcone .

descriptions: Trapasso is not directly mentioned, but Falcone is targeted alongside Mannolo, Scerbo, and Zoffreo; no direct tie to Trapasso.
edges.evidence_quote: 29 marzo 2021: Operazione Big Bang contro le cosche Mannolo , Scerbo, Zoffreo e Falcone .

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf were allied against Sputniks during the 2020 prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

descriptions: Sigue Sigue Commandos are the most ardent rival of Sigue Sigue Sputnik.
edges.evidence_quote: the other one being Sigue Sigue Commandos, who are the Sputnik's most ardent rival.

descriptions: Sputniks fought against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf during the 2020 prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: the gang retaliated against an alliance of Sigue Sigue Commando and Abu Sayyaf convicts

People's Aman Committee.description: The People's Aman Committee was a Pakistani political party-affiliated militant group and organized crime gang based in Lyari, Karachi. Founded in 2008 by gangster Rehman Dakait, it was involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and gang wars, particularly with the Muttahida Qaumi Movement. After Dakait's death in 2009, leadership passed to Uzair Baloch. The group was officially banned in 2011 but continued de facto operations as the Lyari Aman Committee into the late 2010s.

descriptions: PAC was established by ANM as its military wing.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 1963 the ANM leadership established the Palestinian Action Command (PAC), an internal military organisation with nominal authority over the ANM's Palestinian members.

descriptions: The PAC and Arshad Pappu gang are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Arshad Pappu gang , MQM

descriptions: The PAC and MQM are bitter rivals in Karachi.
edges.evidence_quote: The PAC has a bitter rivalry with the Muttahida Qaumi Movement (MQM) in the city of Karachi.

descriptions: RYO succeeded PAC.
edges.evidence_quote: the PAC's name was changed to Revenge Youth Organisation (RYO).

Obshchak.description: The Obshchak is a traditional umbrella organization of criminal groups in Estonia, functioning as a trade union that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries among groups like the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime. Dominated by Nikolai Tarankov from 2003 until his murder in 2016, it funds legal fees and packages for imprisoned members. The organization has about ten member groups and has been involved in drug trafficking, tax fraud, and white-collar crime. Estonian police have disrupted its operations through arrests since the 2010s.

descriptions: Obshchak is an umbrella organization that includes Estonian organized crime groups.
edges.evidence_quote: a traditional umbrella organisation of criminal groups in Estonia, a trade union of sorts that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries of the spheres of interest of various groups such as the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime

descriptions: Obshchak is an umbrella organization that includes Russian mafia groups.
edges.evidence_quote: a traditional umbrella organisation of criminal groups in Estonia, a trade union of sorts that settles conflicts and establishes boundaries of the spheres of interest of various groups such as the Russian mafia and Estonian organized crime

descriptions: The infobox lists Obshchak as an ally of the Serb mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: Infobox lists Obshchak as an ally of Tambovskaya Bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Obshchak

descriptions: American Marines is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.

edges.target: High Council of the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (opponent)
descriptions: High Council of the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan was an opponent of the Taliban from 2015 to 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state opponents High Council of the Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (2015–2021)

descriptions: Cappello clan has an alliance with Piacenti-Ceusi.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella città di Catania l'alleanza stipulata varia da molte cosche: ... Piacenti-Ceusi

descriptions: Infobox lists Pinoy Real as a rival of Bahala Na Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Satanas , Bahala Na Barkada , Pinoy Real

Comando Classe A.description: Brazilian criminal faction originating in the state of Pará, founded around 2018 in Altamira. It emerged from prison disputes, breaking with Comando Vermelho and allying with PCC. The group controls drug trafficking routes in the Amazon region and has ties with Colombian cartels and former FARC members. It remains active as of 2025.

descriptions: Infobox lists Comando Classe A as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Guardiões do Estado , Terceiro Comando Puro , Nova Okaida, Sindicato do Crime do Rio Grande do Norte, Bonde do Maluco , Comando Classe A

descriptions: Comando Classe A is allied with B13.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: Comando Classe A is allied with Colombian cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: Comando Classe A broke away from Comando Vermelho, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: rompendo com o Comando Vermelho e formando uma aliança com o PCC

descriptions: CCA and PCC fought against CV in a prison rebellion.
edges.evidence_quote: O confronto foi entre membros do CCA/PCC e o CV

descriptions: Comando Classe A is allied with FTA.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , FTA , B13 cartéis colombianos

descriptions: Comando Classe A maintains close relations with PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: O grupo surgiu por volta de 2018 e mantém relações próximas com o PCC

descriptions: Comando Classe A is involved with ex-FARC members.
edges.evidence_quote: O CCA estaria envolvido com cartéis da Colômbia e ex-integrantes das FARC

descriptions: Família Terror do Amapá lists CCA as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: PCC , TCP , CCA

descriptions: Comando Classe A é aliado do PCC.
edges.evidence_quote: massacre executado pela facção Comando Classe A, então aliada recente do PCC, contra o CV.

descriptions: 'Ndrina Ferrazzo has alliances with clans from the Catanzaro area.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha alleanze con le cosche dell'area catanzarese

descriptions: Syria is accused of supplying weapons to Hezbollah.
edges.evidence_quote: Many have accused the Assad regime of funneling the weapons to Hezbollah from its border with Lebanon.

descriptions: Syria hosted Hamas's political bureau and was an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Hamas used to be strongly allied with Iran and Syria. Hamas's political bureau was once located in the Syrian capital Damascus before the Syrian civil war.

descriptions: Ba'athist Syria is listed as an opponent (sometimes, until 2024) of SDF in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: List of opponents Hezbollah , Iran , Islamic State , Liwa Fatemiyoun , Popular Mobilization Forces (sometimes) , Popular Resistance of the Eastern Region , Russia , Ba'athist Syria (sometimes, until 2024) , Syrian National Army (until 2025) , Turkey , Arab Tribal and Clan Forces

descriptions: Ba'athist Syria listed as both ally and opponent.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Ba'athist Syria (sometimes, until 2024) ; Opponents: ... Ba'athist Syria (sometimes, until 2024)

descriptions: AQSP was a former group (affiliate) of al-Qaeda until 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... AQSP (until 2018)

descriptions: AQSP was a former group under Al-Qaeda until 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... AQSP (until 2018)

descriptions: AQSP was a former group of al-Qaeda until 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: Former groups: ... AQSP (until 2018)

descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula is an ally of AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula (2007–2017)

Barriox13.description: Barriox13 is a highly active Sureños street gang based in South Los Angeles, founded in the early 1970s. It has over 5,000 members and is divided into West Side and East Side factions, all loyal to the Mexican Mafia. The gang is involved in narcotics, homicide, drug and human trafficking, and has expanded into Southern California and Mexico.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with 135th St Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with Campanella Park Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CPP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV Largo36.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV117st.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with CV155st.
edges.evidence_quote: Barriox13 remains active in its original territory and maintains conflicts with other Hispanic gangs, including CV155st, CV Largo36, CV117st, and others from Compton and South Central.

descriptions: Barriox13 has an alliance with Gardena 13.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 is loyal to the Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Originally, the gang formed for self-protection and has remained loyal to the Mexican Mafia prison gang.

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with West Side Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with WSP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

Quality Street Gang.description: The Quality Street Gang operated in Manchester, England, in the 1960s-1980s. Considered by some police to be major crime instigators, others view them as a social friendship group. No member was ever arrested or convicted. They are linked to football hooliganism and armed robberies in Holland.

descriptions: The Noonan family participated in a truce that included the Quality Street Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Other gangland figures participating in this truce were Paul Massey, Damian Noonan, Paul Flannery and apparently Jimmy 'the Weed' Donnelly, who was a prominent figure in the Quality Street Gang, another Manchester gang.

descriptions: The Quality Street Gang had links to the Inter City Jibbers and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.
edges.evidence_quote: Colin Blaney claims that members of the Quality Street Gang had links to a criminal element within the gang associated with the club known as the Inter City Jibbers, and carried out armed robberies together in Holland.

descriptions: Atomwaffen members sought training with Russian Imperial Movement, indicating a cooperative intent.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen members also sought to train with ... Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Infobox lists Russian Imperial Movement as an ally of Atomwaffen Division.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Aryan Renaissance Society (prison) , Azov Battalion , Active Club Network , Combat 18 , Nordic Resistance Movement , Order of Nine Angles , Russian Imperial Movement , Rusich Group , The Base

descriptions: Atomwaffen Russia received military training from Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: It received military training from the Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Atomwaffen Division lists Russian Imperial Movement as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Russian Imperial Movement provided paramilitary training to Finnish neo-Nazis, including Atomwaffen members.
edges.evidence_quote: In addition to Azov, the Russian Imperial Movement had also provided paramilitary training to the Finnish neo-Nazis.

descriptions: Russian Imperial Movement is listed as an ally of Atomwaffen Division in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Russian Imperial Legion is the fighting arm of the Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: the fighting arm of the Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: The Base lists Russian Imperial Movement as an ally in its infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Atomwaffen Division, Green Brigade, Russian Imperial Movement

descriptions: Some Wagner founders are members of Russian Imperial Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Some founding members of Wagner belong to the far-right ultranationalist Russian Imperial Movement.

descriptions: The Klan opposed the Loyal Leagues, which mobilized Black voters.
edges.evidence_quote: Forrest said the Klan's primary opposition was to the Loyal Leagues

descriptions: The División del Norte became the armed wing of the Conventionist Army.
edges.evidence_quote: la División del Norte se convirtió en el brazo armado del Ejército Convencionista

edges.target: Confederation of Mountain Peoples of the Caucasus
descriptions: Mkhedrioni opposed the Confederation of Mountain Peoples of the Caucasus.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Gamsakhurdia's government in exile , Abkhazia , Bagramyan Battalion , Confederation of Mountain Peoples of the Caucasus

'Ndrina Condello.description: The 'Ndrina Condello is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Villa San Giovanni, and Fiumara, Italy. It is involved in drug and arms trafficking, contract rigging, and extortion rackets. The clan was led by Pasquale Condello until his arrest in 2008, and later by Domenico Condello until his arrest in 2012. It has been engaged in violent feuds, including the Second 'Ndrangheta war.

descriptions: Alvaro mediated peace between De Stefano and Condello after the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Al termine della seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta che vide contrapposti numerose 'ndrine tra cui i De Stefano, i Condello, i Rosmini, gli Imerti, i Tegano e i Serraino per intavolare la pace fece da mediatore tra l’Avvocato Giorgio De Stefano e Pasquale Condello Domenico Alvaro

descriptions: Members of both 'ndrine were arrested in the same operation, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 luglio 2007 con l'operazione "Bless" vengono arrestate 24 persone tra cui esponenti della cosca Condello.

descriptions: Barreca was opposed to Condello during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: During the Second 'Ndrangheta war, the Barreca 'ndrina sided with the De Stefano-Tegano, Libri and Latella 'ndrine against Pasquale Condello, Diego Rosmini and Antonio Imerti.

descriptions: Barreca fought against the Condello clan in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: contro gli Imerti, i Condello, i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini, i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Barreca later reestablished alliances with Condello, indicating cooperation after the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Peppì Barreca' s strategic objective included reestablishing alliances with the influential 'ndrine from Reggio Calabria, such as the De Stefano-Tegano, Condello, and Libri families.

descriptions: The Bruzzise joined the Parrello-Condello side, indicating cooperation with Condello.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise

descriptions: 'Ndrina Condello is a subunit of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Condello è una potentissima cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Condello clan is a constituent family within the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Pasquale Condello ... è un mafioso italiano appartenente all'organizzazione denominata 'ndrangheta.

descriptions: Alvaro intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: The Bruzzise joined the Parrello-Condello faction in the feud against Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano.
edges.evidence_quote: a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise , anch'essi di Palmi ma che controllavano la zona "Montagna delle nevi"

descriptions: Condello and Fontana were involved in a favor exchange, implying cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: come scambio di favori alle 'ndrine del reggino di Pasquale Condello e Giovanni Fontana

descriptions: Condello and Gallico were opposing sides in the Faida di Palmi.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Palmi : scoppiata nel 1977 tra i Condello e i Gallico e durata più di un ventennio.

descriptions: The Condello faction (Parrello-Condello) was in a feud with the Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello -Condello

descriptions: Condello and Imerti seceded together from De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: The Condello clan was allied with the Imerti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Nirta intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Libri and Condello were involved together in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono sequestrati beni del valore di 230 milioni di euro a due imprenditori accusati di avere riciclato e fatto da prestanome alle cosche Tegano , Condello e Libri

descriptions: Condello and Rosmini seceded together from De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: The Condello clan was allied with the Rosmini clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Tegano and Condello were involved together in money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: vengono sequestrati beni del valore di 230 milioni di euro a due imprenditori accusati di avere riciclato e fatto da prestanome alle cosche Tegano , Condello e Libri

descriptions: Zito-Bertuca is a family linked to Condello.
edges.evidence_quote: viene ricostruito l'attuale organigramma dei Condello e della famiglia ad essa collegata degli Zito-Bertuca

descriptions: Condello seceded from De Stefano, starting the Seconda guerra di 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Lo scontro inizia nel 1985 con la secessione dei Condello- Rosmini - Imerti dal clan De Stefano

descriptions: The Condello clan and De Stefano clan were on opposing sides in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: Iniziò così una delle prime due guerre di 'ndrangheta che vedeva i due schieramenti contrapposti.

descriptions: Condello and De Stefano-Libri members were arrested together in a 2010 operation.
edges.evidence_quote: i carabinieri compiono 42 arresti in Lombardia , Friuli-Venezia Giulia ed Emilia-Romagna nei confronti di presunti esponenti dei Condello, e dei De Stefano - Libri

descriptions: The Condello clan was allied with the Fontana clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: New York mafia families intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: The Condello clan was allied with the Saraceno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: I condelliani erano alleati con gli Imerti , i Rosmini , i Fontana e i Saraceno.

descriptions: Cosa Nostra intervened to broker peace between Condello and De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: La pax mafiosa è stata raggiunta solo con l'intervento di Cosa nostra , delle famiglie mafiose di New York , dalla cosca dei Nirta (La Maggiore) di San Luca e dagli Alvaro di Sinopoli

descriptions: Imerti allied with Condello in 1983 through marriage.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1983 si alleano con i Condello , sottoposti dei De Stefano , tramite il matrimonio del capobastone Antonio Imerti e Giuseppina Condello appartenente all' omonima 'ndrina .

descriptions: The Condello clan allied with the Imerti clan during the war.
edges.evidence_quote: Con gli Imerti si schierano i Condello , i Saraceno, i Fontana, i Rosmini , i Lo Giudice e i Serraino

descriptions: Libri is allied with Condello.
edges.evidence_quote: I Libri sono una 'ndrina tra le più potenti di tutta Reggio Calabria alleata dei De Stefano , dei Condello e dei Tegano .

descriptions: Lo Giudice allied with Condello during the second 'ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Nella seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta i Lo Giudice si schierarono con gli Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Rosmini .

descriptions: The Parrello and Condello are allied in the feud against Gallico.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel maggio del 1977 scoppia una faida tra i Gallico-Morgante-Sgrò-Sciglitano e tra i Parrello - Condello a cui si aggiungono anche i Bruzzise

descriptions: Serraino fought alongside Condello during the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Al comando della 'Ndrina passeranno i fratelli Paolo e Domenico, che dopo l'agguato subito entrarono in guerra al fianco dei Condello , qualificando con la forza militare e delle armi il proprio determinante contributo.

descriptions: De Stefano fought Condello in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: La risposta non si fece attendere: 2 giorni dopo, il 13 ottobre 1985 avviene il duplice omicidio del boss Paolo De Stefano e l'autista Antonio Pellicanò dagli Imerti che prima del fatto sancirono un'alleanza tramite il matrimonio del capobastone Antonio Imerti e Giuseppina Condello appartenente all'omonima 'ndrina scoppia la seconda guerra di 'ndrangheta .

descriptions: Tegano and Condello are linked in the Thalassia operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 10 maggio 2018 si conclude l'operazione Thalassia che porta all'arresto di 6 persone legate ai Tegano-Condello che avrebbero avuto interessi alla costruzione del complesso immobiliare Thalassa a Reggio Calabria incominciato nel 2006.

descriptions: De Stefano fought a war against Condello-Imerti alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The bloody six-year war between the Condello-Imerti clan and De Stefano allied with the Tegano clan caused 621 deaths.

descriptions: Condello were underbosses of De Stefano, later became rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: A second 'Ndrangheta war was triggered by the marriage between Giuseppina Condello – the sister of the Condello brothers, underbosses of De Stefano – and Antonio Imerti

descriptions: Condello 'ndrina participated in a meeting with Cosa Nostra representatives.
edges.evidence_quote: come rappresentante delle prime (in particolare i Tegano, Condello, Latella, Ficara, Serraino e Imerti) partecipò Giuseppe De Stefano e per i secondi Giuseppe e Filippo Graviano

descriptions: SLM (Tambour) has been an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Tambour) (from 2023)

descriptions: SLM (Tambour) is an opponent of RSF since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Tambour) (from 2023)

descriptions: The Young Lords collaborated with LADO in a building occupation.
edges.evidence_quote: In early 1969, the Young Lords occupied the Presbyterian McCormick Theological Seminary in collaboration with the Black Panthers, LADO, the Young Patriots Organization , and the SDS for almost a week

Sonora Cartel.description: Mexican drug cartel founded in 1987 by Miguel Caro Quintero and Rafael Caro Quintero, operating out of northern Mexico and smuggling drugs into the United States. It was considered one of the oldest and best-established cartels by the DEA, with direct links to Colombian cartels. The cartel was acquired by the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007 and reported defunct by 2010.

descriptions: Colima Cartel listed as allied with Sonora Cartel in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Guadalajara Cartel Milenio Cartel Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel is listed as an ally of Guadalajara Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel , Medellín Cartel , Cali Cartel , Norte del Valle Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Sonora Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel became a branch of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Milenio (Michoacán) , Jalisco (Guadalajara), Sonora (Sonora) , and Colima cartels were now branches of the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Sonora Cartel received cocaine shipments from the Cali Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sonora Cartel is believed to be one of the earliest cartels to begin shipping cocaine from Colombia , particularly from the Cali Cartel .

descriptions: Cali Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Guadalajara Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Sonora Cartel originated from the Guadalajara Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sonora cartel's roots are in the Guadalajara Cartel, which dissolved after the 1989 arrest of its co-founder, Miguel Ángel Félix Gallardo .

descriptions: Medellin Cartel is listed as an ally of the Sonora Cartel in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Medellin Cartel , Cali Cartel , Guadalajara Cartel

descriptions: Leaders of the disintegrated Sonora Cartel were incorporated into the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Upon the cartel's disintegration, its leaders were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Sonora Cartel became a branch of the Sinaloa Cartel by 2007.
edges.evidence_quote: By 2007, the Sonora Cartel, Colima Cartel , and Milenio Cartel became branches of the Sinaloa Cartel .

descriptions: Leaders of the disintegrated Sonora Cartel were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Upon the cartel's disintegration, its leaders were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Negotiating faction succeeded Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: Succeeded by: Negotiating faction

Ajang Ajang group.description: A cell within the Abu Sayyaf terrorist organization active in the southern Philippines. The group specialized in bomb attacks and its name means 'orphans' in Tausug, referring to members who lost loved ones due to war. It claimed responsibility for the 2019 Jolo Cathedral bombings and was linked to other attacks.

descriptions: Ajang Ajang group was a cell within Abu Sayyaf.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ajang Ajang group ( Tausug : Baanan Ajang Ajang , Sulat Sūg : بَأَنَنْ اَجَڠْ٢) was a cell within the terrorist organization Abu Sayyaf .

descriptions: Bombs attributed to Ajang Ajang's elders carried the signature of Islamic State, indicating a link.
edges.evidence_quote: The two bombs carried the signature of the Ajang Ajang's elders, Islamic State .

descriptions: Ajang Ajang group was part of the Islamic State's East Asia Province until 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: East Asia Province Ajang Ajang group (until 2019)

descriptions: Morabito, via Palamara and Sculli, works with Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support these Sicilian families.
edges.evidence_quote: spalleggiatori delle famiglie siciliane Fiandaca, Morso, Rinzivillo e Emmanuello di Gela

descriptions: Palamara, via Sculli, are active in illegal betting with Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support the Emmanuello family.
edges.evidence_quote: tramite il nipote del Morabito Giuseppe Sculli , sono attivi in particolar modo nel totonero insieme a malavitosi albanesi e bosniaci come Safet Altic, spalleggiatori delle famiglie siciliane Fiandaca, Morso, Rinzivillo e Emmanuello di Gela

descriptions: The Emmanuello clan (Cosa Nostra) obtained drugs from 'Ndrangheta suppliers.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2009 i siciliani si rivolgono nuovamente alle 'ndrine per rifornirsi di droga, i Fidanzati di Palermo e gli Emmanuello di Gela prendevano la droga colombiana spedita attraverso i porti di Anversa e Amburgo.

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers attempted to negotiate a truce with Seven Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: On December 2, 1971, Cornell Benjamin, known as "Black Benjie", a former heroin addict turned community activist who had joined the Bronx gang the Ghetto Brothers and become their minister of peace, led a delegation to meet with members of rival gangs the Mongols, the Savage Skulls, and the Seven Immortals in order to negotiate a truce.

descriptions: The Savage Nomads had running battles with the Seven Immortals, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs Seven Immortals, Savage Skulls , and the Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: Savage Skulls engaged in running battles with Seven Immortals.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang ... was also involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs, including the Seven Immortals, Savage Nomads, and Dirty Dozen.

descriptions: The Zemun Clan cooperated with the BIA by providing information in exchange for training.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2001, the Zemun clan organized 'special training courses' with the BIA, lending them information on Kosovar Albanian insurgents in exchange.

descriptions: The clan cooperated with BIA by providing training and exchanging information.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2001, el clan Zemun organizó 'cursos de formación especiales' con la BIA, prestándoles, a cambio, información sobre insurgentes albaneses de Kosovo.

descriptions: Grande Aracri allied with Vrenna-Bonaventura.
edges.evidence_quote: the 'ndrina allied with other groups, in particular with the Vrenna-Bonaventura 'ndrina

New Irish Republican Army.description: Irish republican paramilitary group formed in 2012 from a merger of the Real IRA, Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD), and other small militant groups. It is the largest dissident republican group, active mainly in Northern Ireland, and has launched attacks against the PSNI and British Army. The group continues the campaign of the original IRA.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: The New IRA is listed as a rival of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: New IRA

descriptions: Continuity IRA is listed as an ally of New IRA in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Continuity IRA

descriptions: Kinahan cartel killed New IRA member Michael Barr over a safe house.
edges.evidence_quote: Gardaí suspected Barr was shot dead because it was believed by the Kinahan cartel that he had provided a 'safe house' to one of the gunmen in the Regency Hotel attack.

descriptions: New IRA is a continuation of Real IRA after merger with RAAD.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: RAAD merged with Real IRA to form New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a continuation of the Real Irish Republican Army (Real IRA), which began to be called the 'New IRA' in July 2012 when Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups merged with it.

descriptions: Saoradh is the political wing of New IRA.
edges.evidence_quote: It is widely considered that Saoradh is the political wing of the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with other groups to form the New IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, "the IRA", and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: The Real IRA merged with other groups to form the New IRA in July 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: In July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. This new entity was named the New IRA by the media

descriptions: The Real IRA merged into the New IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: On 26 July 2012, it was reported that Republican Action Against Drugs (RAAD) and other small republican militant groups were merging with the Real IRA. As before, the group would continue to refer to itself as 'the Irish Republican Army', though some media began to refer to the group as a 'new IRA'.

descriptions: Republican Action Against Drugs merged with the Real IRA to form the New IRA in 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: RAAD, "the IRA", and some smaller groups merged with the Real IRA in 2012 to form the New IRA.

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is believed to be allied with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: The following are presently believed to be allied with al-Qaeda: - Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is an ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is listed as a non-state ally of Al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is listed as a non-state ally of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies: ... Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is a non-state ally of the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies Islamic Jihad Union

descriptions: Islamic Jihad Union is a non-state ally of Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: Non-state allies ... Islamic Jihad Union
